violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw burgers over raw salmon and minced lobster). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink and orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of and machine was actively being cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Mozambique sauce was observed held at 64 degrees Fahrenheit (room temperature). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Gasket for 2 door prep unit was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Hot water was not available at handwashing sink at server station. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The screen door and some parts of the floor in the dish room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate once food safety certificate is obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

Lobster sauce was observed held at 67 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hot holding unit was adjusted and food was reheated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the black rack in the dish room was observed with an accumulation of food debris and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
Hot water was not available at handwashing sink at server station. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. screen door; door sweep 2. coving in customer restroom 3. some parts of the floor in the dishroom The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The floors and walls throughout the back of the house have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
